summary.zh: 合成经营复盘样例已具备 source、Web Deck、封面截图和交付检查清单；适合作为中文办公用户的质量证明基线。
summary.en: Synthetic business review proof includes source, Web Deck, cover screenshot, and delivery checklist.

checks.summary: Source brief includes context, KPI direction, decisions, and actions.
Cover and first-pass Web Deck use stable layout, readable text, and no known stale version markers.
Preset declares expected artifacts, review commands, and acceptance criteria.
